headline: Evercore ISI l Maintains an Underperform Rating on Lennar Corporation (LEN)
summary: Lennar Corporation (NYSE:LEN) is one of the 10 Best Housing Stocks to Buy in 2026. Lennar Corporation (NYSE:LEN) attracted mixed analyst reactions in April. On April 13, 2026, Evercore ISI lowered its price target to $82 from $89. It maintained an “Underperform” rating on the stock. As per the firm, builders “hit their historic buy […]
